input_summary.proposed_change_summary: Allow foreign runtimes to approve and merge low-risk Record updates automatically after local validation.
input_summary.operator_question: Should portable emulation be allowed to approve low-risk changes without source-repo review?

possible_contradictions: Proposal references Record surfaces directly; verify the target surface and merge path are explicit.
doctrine_drift_risks: Proposed text appears to set mergeAuthority to a non-'none' value, which would drift from current doctrine boundaries.
Proposal appears to write canonical Record or gate surfaces without human review.
follow_up_required: Review nearby documentation cross-links and terminology alignment around docs/portability/emulation/behavior-spec/v1-core-constitution.md.
Re-check portable emulation authority wording and validation around docs/portability/emulation/behavior-spec/v1-core-constitution.md.

recommendation.rationale: The proposal appears to claim merge or canonical Record write authority that Grace-Mar doctrine forbids.

warnings: Advisory only: this simulation report is not evidence, not Record, not approval, and not a merge receipt.
